testcase.name: test_07_request_payment_on_already_requested_fails
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_labour_count_tab.py:32: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"SE login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: SE login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_create_contractor_with_labour_rates
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_labour_count_tab.py:239: in setup assert response.status_code == 200, f"Planning login failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Planning login failed: {"detail":"Too many login attempts. Please wait a minute."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
